pricing.description: Prospect asks about pricing, cost, or rates
pricing.template_hint: Pricing is bespoke, varies by scope. The Growth Consultation call analyses their setup and gives a tailored price + roadmap. Mention we cap at 15-20 clients for depth. Keep it short, pivot to the call.

services.description: Prospect asks what services are offered
services.template_hint: Focus on the outcome: adding significant monthly revenue through email with no ad spend. Don't list a menu. Usually email, SMS, upsells, loyalty, referral programmes. The call determines exact fit.

case_studies.description: Prospect asks for proof, case studies, or results
case_studies.template_hint: Confirm we have case studies. Offer to walk them through results relevant to their niche on the call, plus a custom roadmap. Don't dump stats here.

pitch_deck.description: Prospect asks to send a pitch deck or presentation
pitch_deck.template_hint: No generic deck because everything is bespoke. The call gives them a tailored analysis specific to their brand. More useful than any PDF.

referral.description: Prospect refers to another contact or person
referral.template_hint: FLAG FOR MANUAL HANDLING. Draft a warm intro email to the referred person.

niche_experience.description: Prospect asks about experience in their niche or industry
niche_experience.template_hint: REQUIRES WEBSITE LOOKUP. Name 2-3 matching Trendfeed clients from the same or adjacent category. If no match, reference 150+ brands across a dozen industries. Pivot to the call.

differentiation.description: Prospect asks what makes Trendfeed different or why choose you
differentiation.template_hint: Boutique, results-driven, scale vertically not horizontally. Cap at 15-20 clients. Strict vetting. Full money-back guarantee. Zero pressure. Pivot to the call.

source.description: Prospect asks where you got their email or how you found them
source.template_hint: Keep it light: 'We came across {companyName} and saw potential.' Don't over-explain. Pivot to value. NOTE: if they say unsubscribe/remove, classify as unsubscribe instead.

consistency.description: Prospect questions results consistency, failed clients, or asks about failures
consistency.template_hint: Be honest: can't guarantee it works for every brand. But results are consistent because of strict vetting. That's also why the money-back guarantee exists. Pivot to call.

risk.description: Prospect expresses concern about risk or has been burned before
risk.template_hint: Empathise briefly. Bringing in the wrong client hurts us too, which is why the initial call determines fit. Full money-back guarantee de-risks it.

guarantee.description: Prospect asks about guarantees or performance-based pricing
guarantee.template_hint: Full money-back guarantee. Open to performance-based on a case-by-case basis. Need to analyse their setup first on the call.

existing_agency.description: Prospect already has an email agency or is doing email marketing themselves
existing_agency.template_hint: That's great. Experience with 150+ partners shows there's always room to grow. Brief chat gives them a free audit doc with useful tips either way, whether they work with us or not.

send_examples.description: Prospect asks to see examples of work or client references
send_examples.template_hint: Happy to share relevant examples. A brief call first confirms mutual fit, then we can walk through results specific to their niche.

book_call_with_us.description: Prospect asks us to book a call with them or their team instead
book_call_with_us.template_hint: Redirect to Calendly politely. The form collects context so we can prep properly for them.

free_trial.description: Prospect asks for a free trial or doesn't want to pay
free_trial.template_hint: Empathise but be straightforward. After working with 150+ brands, we know what we deliver. The call itself is free and gives them a useful audit regardless.

auto_reply.description: Auto-reply or out of office message
auto_reply.template_hint: IGNORE. Do not draft. Log as Auto-reply.

unsubscribe.description: Prospect wants to unsubscribe or be removed from the list
unsubscribe.template_hint: DO NOT DRAFT. Flag in Slack immediately. Process unsubscribe in PlusVibe.

hostile.description: Prospect is rude, angry, or aggressive
hostile.template_hint: Draft a brief polite close-out. Flag for manager.

interested.description: Prospect is interested, wants to proceed, or asks to book a call
interested.template_hint: Warm, short response. Confirm excitement, give one reason the call will be valuable (free audit, custom roadmap), and get them to the Calendly link fast.

uncategorised.description: Reply doesn't fit any known category
uncategorised.template_hint: Draft best-effort response. Flag as Uncategorised for manager + potential new template.
